rules.rule: Pre-handle top 5 objections before they are raised in every outreach sequence
Every email under 100 words converts better than long-form for cold outreach
Every piece of content must expand to 7 formats minimum
Kill any workflow that fails 3+ consecutive times without intervention
rules.reason: Persistent failures corrupt data and waste credits

rules.rule: A/B test is always running on every outreach touchpoint

open_questions: Which ICP converts fastest: founder vs marketing director vs agency owner?
Does HN or Reddit drive higher-quality leads for our products?
What is the actual time from first contact to close for ProFlow Starter?
